title: Welcome to the Credit Management
text: This quick tour walks you through the Credit Management System — where you manage institutional credits, staff allocations, and financial reporting.

title: Navigation
text: Use the sidebar to switch between sections: Overview, Staff Management, Financials, Audit Ledger, and Pricing Info.

title: Main Content Area
text: The selected section is displayed here. Each view provides detailed data about your institution's credit usage.

title: Institutional Balance
text: Your organisation's current credit balance is shown here. It updates in real time as credits are allocated or consumed.

title: Purchase Credits
text: Click here to top up your institutional credit balance. Credits are shared across all staff members you assign them to.

title: Staff Management
text: View and manage your institution's staff members. Allocate or recall credits for individual staff, and monitor each person's balance.

title: Financials
text: Review your institution's credit purchase history and available coupon codes in the Financials section.

title: Audit Ledger
text: The Audit Ledger provides a full history of every credit transaction — allocations, consumption, and adjustments — for transparency and compliance.

title: Pricing Info
text: Browse available credit packages and pricing tiers here to choose the right plan for your institution.
